programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: Emma travels to Italy to teach and research a wedding veil said to bring its owner love. While there, she meets Paolo, the son of a local lace-making family.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Coming Golden Age Interview with Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. Jeremiah and Sheila Walsh discuss the Millennium, the coming reign of Christ here on earth that will last a thousand years.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is Buddhism compatible with Christianity? The short answer is no.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Mayor of Maybe Doles Out Doubt
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy paired with his mum as an unlikely partner. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow always saves the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.sub-title: The Power of Good: Ian Warren
programme.desc: Thinking that you need to be great, before you start to do good is a misguided mindset. When people engage in doing good as a business mindset, it leads to success, including better financial outcomes.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: The pain of betrayal can feel impossible to bear and can shatter trust, confidence, and hope. However, whether rebuilding ourselves or a relationship, there is always a way back to a future worth fighting for.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: God's Healing For Long-Term Conditions_Lessons From John 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: The vast expanses of rural Queensland don't deter Debbie Bazzo from spreading kindness. With Care Outreach, she traverses great distances to bring support and companionship to isolated communities.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia adopts a dog and seeks help from expert dog trainer Owen. When hired to design a nursery and puppery and plan a puppy shower, Julia asks Owen's advice.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours.

programme.title: All Saints
programme.desc: When a group of Burmese refugees join the congregation, the pastor of a failing Anglican church attempts to aid them by planting crops and enlisting the help of the community.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, enjoyable, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: God's Healing For Long-Term Conditions_Lessons From John 5 Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.sub-title: Information; Where To Get it From
programme.desc: Where we share, laugh and dream. Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, Bible Discovery TV is a thirty-minute daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Lessons from Philippians: Praise Your Way Out
programme.desc: Arrested and beaten, apostle Paul and his disciple Silas were thrown into prison. Yet still they sang praises to God. In Praise Your Way Out, Pastor Bayless shares powerful lessons.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Discover a love that keeps no record of wrongs. Step into the freedom of being perfectly loved by a God who never gives up on you.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: With news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, The 700 Club shares powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.sub-title: What Do You Think of Yourself? - Part 2

programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships withDr Stanley.

programme.title: Love at First Bark

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly

programme.title: The Blello Show

programme.title: Elevation Experience

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good

programme.desc: Witness individuals who risk their lives and lost loved ones. See God move in extraordinary ways.

programme.desc: In a bleak future where deviants are locked in brutal re-education camps, a freedom fighter and an innocent inmate must endure their captors' deadly kill-or-be-killed game.
